findings.title: Critical Regression in Core Metrics
findings.description: The recent regression in core page load metrics poses a critical risk to user experience and customer satisfaction, potentially leading to increased churn if not addressed promptly.
assumptions: The regression in metrics is impacting user experience significantly.
recommendations: Address the regression in core metrics immediately to improve user experience.

metadata.mitigation: Implement performance optimization strategies and monitor metrics closely.

findings.title: Memory Leak in WebSocket Connections
findings.description: The memory leak in real-time WebSocket connections poses a risk of service outages, affecting customer experience. This needs immediate attention to prevent OOM crashes.
assumptions: The memory leak is causing server crashes and affecting service availability.
recommendations: Fix the memory leak in WebSocket connections to ensure service stability.

metadata.mitigation: Conduct a thorough code review and implement fixes for the memory leak.

findings.title: API Latency Degradation
findings.description: API response times have degraded significantly, impacting automated alerting systems and overall user experience. This poses a risk to service reliability.
assumptions: The degradation in API response times is affecting user interactions.
recommendations: Optimize API performance to restore acceptable response times.

metadata.mitigation: Review and optimize database queries and API logic.

findings.title: Accessibility Risk Identified
findings.description: There is a potential accessibility risk due to insufficient compliance with WCAG standards, which could hinder users with disabilities from effectively using the platform.
assumptions: Accessibility features may not fully meet WCAG AA standards.
recommendations: Conduct an accessibility audit and implement necessary changes to meet WCAG AA standards.

metadata.mitigation: Enhance accessibility features and conduct user testing with assistive technologies.
metadata.policy_rule: Accessibility is a requirement, not an afterthought

summary: Identified 4 risks (1 accessibility, 3 performance). 1 flagged as blockers. Risk gate: FAILED (1 blockers, 0 warnings).
